nl_query: Show the complete encryption and scanning chain for each script created in the last 7 days: script URN, DEK ID, KEK external ID, KEK scope, KEK status, scanner device name, and whether the DEK was re-wrapped after a Direct Connect outage.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.urn, dek.id AS dek_id, kek.external_id AS kek_external_id, kek.scope AS kek_scope, kek.status AS kek_status, sd.device_name AS scanner_device_name, CASE WHEN al.action = 'DEK_REWRAP' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS re_wrapped_after_direct_connect
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   data_encryption_key dek ON dek.id = a.dek_id
JOIN   key_encryption_key  kek ON kek.id = dek.key_encryption_key_id
LEFT   JOIN scanner_device  sd  ON sd.id = kek.workstation_id
LEFT   JOIN audit_log al ON al.entity_type = 'data_encryption_key' AND al.entity_id = dek.id AND al.action = 'DEK_REWRAP'
WHERE  a.created_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP  BY a.urn, dek.id, kek.external_id, kek.scope, kek.status, sd.device_name, re_wrapped_after_direct_connect
ORDER  BY a.created_at DESC;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: column "a.created_at" must appear in the GROUP BY clause or be used in an aggregate function
LINE 1: ...ce_name, re_wrapped_after_direct_connect ORDER BY a.created_...
                                                             ^
